# 📖 Description
Unlock a forbidden power that blends archaeology with sorcery. It all begins in the depths of the Ancient Cities, where you must find a lost enchantment for your brush. With it, you can collect DNA samples by brushing the headboards of beds where your targets have slept.

The Ritual: To bring the effigy to life, you must prepare an altar of heat and stitching. Place a lit campfire beneath a cauldron filled with water. Throw 4 sticks, 4 strings, and the DNA sample into the boiling water. The cauldron will bubble and consume the materials to forge a Voodoo Doll bound to that soul.

Once created, the player's fate is in your hands: use honey blocks to root their feet to the ground, sugar to grant them vigor, or torture tools like fire and anvils for a tragic end. The only salvation is the Warding Totem, a mystical item that only appears in Buried Treasures (treasure maps). When equipped as a chestplate, this amulet will absorb both blessings and curses, draining its durability to protect your soul, though an anvil impact will shatter it instantly.
![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/Jn9LysSk/vodoo.png)
